nl_query: Show all approved revaluation requests where the resulting evaluation attempt was created but the evaluator has not started marking within 3 working days of the attempt assignment.
failed_sql:
SELECT rr.id AS request_id, rr.script_id, rr.approved_at, ea.id AS attempt_id, ea.status, ea.evaluator_user_id, au.display_name AS evaluator
FROM   revaluation_request rr
JOIN   evaluation_attempt ea ON ea.id = rr.resulting_attempt_id
JOIN   answer_script a ON a.id = ea.script_id
JOIN   script_assignment sa ON sa.script_id = a.id
JOIN   faculty_cache fc ON fc.employee_id = sa.evaluator_id
JOIN   app_user au ON au.id = ea.evaluator_user_id
WHERE  rr.approval_status = 'APPROVED'
  AND  ea.status           = 'ASSIGNED'
  AND  ea.is_active        = TRUE
  AND  ea.started_at      <= working_day_offset(ea.script_assignment.cal_date, 3, a.academic_year)
ORDER  BY rr.approved_at ASC
error: Validation failed (schema): Hallucinated column(s): script_assignment.cal_date, answer_script.academic_year. Use only columns that exist in the schema.
